mapper.sql: f.id, f.park_id, p.name AS park_name, f.building_id, b.name AS building_name, f.floor_no, f.area, f.status, f.memo, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time

COALESCE(rs.used_area, 0) AS used_area, COALESCE(rs.total_count, 0) AS total_count, COALESCE(rs.rented_count, 0) AS rented_count, COALESCE(rs.vacant_count, 0) AS vacant_count, COALESCE(rs.reserved_count, 0) AS reserved_count, COALESCE(rs.renovating_count, 0) AS renovating_count, COALESCE(rs.disabled_count, 0) AS disabled_count, COALESCE(rs.expiring90_count, 0) AS expiring90_count, COALESCE(rs.expiring30_count, 0) AS expiring30_count, COALESCE(rs.expired_count, 0) AS expired_count

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT building_id, floor, COUNT(1) AS total_count, SUM(COALESCE(area, 0)) AS used_area, SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_count, SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vacant_count, SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reserved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS renovating_count, SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS disabled_count, SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expiring90_count, SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expiring30_count, SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '6' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_count FROM ( SELECT r.building_id, r.floor, r.area, r.status, CASE WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_exiting, 0) = 1 THEN '3' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expired, 0) = 1 THEN '6' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expiring30, 0) = 1 THEN '5' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expiring90, 0) = 1 THEN '4' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_active, 0) = 1 THEN '7' ELSE r.status END AS display_status FROM ics_room r
) room_status GROUP BY building_id, floor ) rs ON rs.building_id = f.building_id AND rs.floor = f.floor_no
ORDER BY p.name ASC, b.name ASC, f.floor_no DESC

CASE WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_exiting, 0) = 1 THEN '3' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expired, 0) = 1 THEN '6' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expiring30, 0) = 1 THEN '5' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expiring90, 0) = 1 THEN '4' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_active, 0) = 1 THEN '7' ELSE r.status END

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status IN ('6', '7', '8') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_exiting, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '2' OR (contract_status = '1' AND end_date < CURDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expired, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' AND end_date >= CURDATE() AND end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expiring30, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' AND end_date > DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expiring90, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_active FROM ( SELECT c.room_id AS room_id, c.contract_status, c.end_date FROM biz_contract c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.room_id IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT CAST(REPLACE(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.room_ids, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1)), 'room_', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS room_id, c.contract_status, c.end_date FROM biz_contract c INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 ) numbers ON numbers.n <= 1 + LENGTH(COALESCE(c.room_ids, '')) - LENGTH(REPLACE(COALESCE(c.room_ids, ''), ',', '')) WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.room_ids IS NOT NULL AND c.room_ids != '' ) contract_room WHERE room_id IS NOT NULL AND room_id > 0 GROUP BY room_id ) contract_room_status ON contract_room_status.room_id = r.id
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM ics_floor f LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = f.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = f.park_id

SELECT
FROM ics_floor f LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = f.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = f.park_id

SELECT ,
FROM ics_floor f LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = f.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = f.park_id

SELECT ,
FROM ics_floor f LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = f.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = f.park_id
WHERE f.building_id = #{buildingId} AND f.floor_no = #{floorNo} ORDER BY f.id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT f.floor_no AS floorNo, f.area FROM ics_floor f WHERE f.building_id = #{buildingId} ORDER BY f.floor_no ASC

SELECT r.id, r.park_id, p.name AS park_name, r.building_id, b.name AS building_name, r.name, r.floor, r.area, r.rent_price, r.property_fee, r.house_type, r.orientation, r.address, r.facilities, r.highlights, r.scene_images, r.floor_plan_images, r.status AS base_status, AS status, r.sync_status, r.sync_time, r.memo, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time FROM ics_room r LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = r.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = r.park_id
WHERE (r.building_id, r.floor) IN
(#{floor.buildingId}, #{floor.floorNo})
AND = #{roomStatus}
ORDER BY b.name ASC, r.floor DESC, r.name ASC, r.id ASC
